primaryOwner.name: Rachel Anderson
primaryOwner.role: Hook the Horizon publication owner and final editorial authority

operationalMaintainer.role: Hook the Horizon field intelligence operations
responsibilities: maintain the source register and record IDs
run scheduled source and content review
record corrections, version changes, and retirements
prevent current-condition, regulation, access, catch, and precise-location claims from entering Hatch Match records
confirm that public copy remains observation-led and appropriately limited
route material biological interpretation changes for qualified source review

sourceHierarchy.use: taxonomy, life stage, observable morphology, broad habitat, and documented limitations
clarification, contradiction resolution, and species or family detail
observable field distinctions when the author, edition, and limitations are documented
question discovery only; not sufficient as the sole source for an approved record

publicationStates.draft: not available to a public or installed preview
publicationStates.review_required: source or interpretation review is incomplete
publicationStates.approved_preview: bounded generalized record allowed in isolated preview only
publicationStates.production_eligible: all source, maintenance, privacy, design, and runtime gates passed
publicationStates.needs_correction: record remains withheld until corrected and re-reviewed
publicationStates.retired: record must not appear in current results

freshnessRules.scheduledReview: Review each approved record and every source at least every 90 days.
freshnessRules.hardExpiry: Remove a record from evaluation when the hard expiry date passes.
freshnessRules.sourceFailure: Move the affected record to review_required when a sole supporting source becomes unavailable or materially changes.
freshnessRules.contradiction: Move the affected record to review_required when a credible source creates a material taxonomy, morphology, habitat, or life-stage conflict.
freshnessRules.materialChange: Increment the record version and preserve a change entry when cues, limitations, source set, taxonomy, or publication state changes.
freshnessRules.nonMaterialChange: URL normalization or typo correction may retain the version when meaning and source identity do not change, but the maintenance log must record the edit.

triggeredReviews: source URL, title, publisher, or content materially changes
new official or qualified source contradicts a record
a privacy or sensitive-location concern is found
a record is interpreted as current conditions or a catch prediction
reader correction identifies a material error
application logic or input vocabulary changes
prohibitedOwnership: pattern recommendation presented as biological certainty
correctionProcess: withhold the affected record when the defect is material
record the defect, source, date, and scope
correct the record and increment its version when meaning changes
run schema, privacy, content-firewall, accessibility, and installed-preview tests
record the review decision and next review date
retirementProcess: exclude the record from current evaluation
preserve the ID, final version, reason, and retirement date in the maintenance log
do not silently reuse the retired ID for a different taxon or interpretation
productionPreconditions: source availability monitor active or documented manual process accepted
maintenance log included in the release package
live route and data readback confirms the approved seed version
no precise-location, current-condition, regulation, access, or catch claim is emitted
